}

@startsalt
!function $myfunc()
  !$n = 4
  !$row = 0
  !$res = ""
  !while $row < $n
    !$column = 0
    !while $column < $n
      !$res = $res + "| "+ $row + "," + $column
      !$column = $column + 1
    !endwhile
    !$res = $res + %newline()
    !$row = $row + 1
  !endwhile
  !return $res
!end function

{#
$myfunc()
}
@endsalt
